_doc: Machine-readable lane->epic index the ops-monitor (scripts/ops-monitor-check.sh) reads with jq. Join key = epic_id; ready-count per lane = `br ready --parent <epic_id> --limit 0 --json`. A lane is KNOWN/resumable when gate is null or expired; GATED only when a non-null unexpired gate object is present. epic_id:null REQUIRES a non-null gate (the lane has no ready-bead source, so it can never spuriously fire the stall wake). Admiral-owned; captain updates on staffing. Update in the SAME action as any lane add/retask/park. Seed = active + on-deck + parked lanes only (DONE lanes are not staffing candidates).

lanes.label: codename:core-loop-proof
lanes.note: PRIORITY #1 (operator 019f4ed0). kynes owns GATE-0: isolated scratch-daemon e2e that repros the pi in-daemon hang on OLD binary d7abf34a + proves green with afa32372 (doubles as root-cause confirmation of the SUSPECT extension-load theory — captain confirmed no .pi/extensions on main). On GATE-0 green: captain redeploys on own authority, kynes re-runs pi seed -> hk-hcrvb complete. Redeploy DECOUPLED from stilgar's gate beads (019f4ec1). kynes-q paused (scratch-daemon e2e, not fleet queue); kynes may age out of comms who while its bg e2e sub-agent runs — NOT a zombie. paused-queue:kynes-q flag is EXPECTED.

lanes.label: codename:remote-substrate
lanes.note: PRIORITY #2 (operator 019f4ed0). hawat (Opus) — remote is buggy, needs heavy TESTING. Test-first (L0-L5 / isolated test-daemon) on the reverse-tunnel + remote worktree-create reliability path. CONSTRAINT: gb-mbp live re-enable is OPERATOR-HELD — hawat does NOT flip gb-mbp; needs-live-remote beads escalate to captain. COLLISION GUARD: internal/daemon (workloop.go) overlaps stilgar's hk-ih5k6 daemon tests — coordinate before landing.

lanes.label: codename:crew-harness-select
lanes.note: PRIORITY #3 (operator 019f4ed0). Captain SCOPED hk-q3ovr into 6 child beads (spike hk-fijwi blocks hk-l63b9 -> hk-lrf30 -> hk-0ysh3/6z72r/8efdl). piter (Opus) runs the spike first — it CONCLUDES in a session-model design choice the OPERATOR must ratify; piter surfaces 2-3 options to captain, does NOT self-lock. Only hk-fijwi is ready now; the rest unblock after ratification. Pi-as-orchestrator shares the same gap; routing+non-TUI beads cover it.

lanes.label: codename:quality-enforcement
lanes.note: PRIORITY #4 (operator 019f4ed0). stilgar owns the fail-closed gate track: hk-x2spu (reviewer-verdict trailer gate — re-scoped: land approved check-hooks.sh+Makefile, prove acceptance in ISOLATED worktree, NO primary-repo lefthook-install) + hk-ih5k6 (daemon regression tests, running) + hk-vdqe2 (P1 keeper clear->brief race, HARD e2e-repro merge gate) after. NEW bead directed onto this lane: containedctx/contextcheck main-lint-debt cleanup (gates LIVE fail-closed activation, NOT the redeploy). PARALLEL quality track — no longer the flagship/redeploy blocker (019f4ec1).

lanes.label: codename:comms-test-harness
lanes.note: PRIORITY #5 (operator 019f4ed0). yueh (Sonnet) — systematic context-cancel implementation across the comms test-harness (~20/27), file-disjoint from daemon+hooks. Old yueh-q paused-by-failure -> using yueh2-q. Dispatched T2b hk-1x8az. Holding T4 hk-tnyb7 (operator design-questions bead) — surfaces to captain, does not self-resolve. Root-cause already fixed (harness:codex empty-model hang label removed -> routes claude/sonnet); surface if it reappears.
